description: Thank you for choosing Basil Volkswagen of Lockport, this Pure White 2025 Volkswagen Tiguan SE is a great choice! Check out the following:   One Owner!   No Accidents!    City 22/ Hwy 30     Combination Roadside Kit ($110 value)First Aid KitRoadside Assistance Kit  PURE WHITE   Convenience Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.Technology and Telematics App-Connect (w/Apple CarPlay, Android Auto & MirrorLink) smart device wireless mirroring    Basil Discounts and Buy For Pricing may include dealer cash or incentives in lieu of Special Financing rates. Versatility is also a hallmark of the Civic Sport, with its Split Folding Rear Seat and ample cargo space, allowing you to easily accommodate your ever-changing needs, whether it's transporting gear for your active lifestyle or carrying larger items.  This 2025 Honda Civic Sport is a testament to the brand's commitment to engineering excellence and customer satisfaction. description: Thank you for choosing Patterson Nissan, this Super Black 2025 Nissan Sentra SV is a great choice! Check out the following:     City 30/ Hwy 40        SUPER BLACK, CHARCOAL, UPGRADED CLOTH SEAT TRIM, [C03] 50 STATE EMISSIONS, [L92] CARPETED FLOOR MATS W/TRUNK MAT  Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. Stay comfortable with the dual-zone automatic climate control and heated front seats, while the power driver's seat ensures the perfect driving position.  Safety is a top priority in the Sonata, with a suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies to give you peace of mind. The Blind Spot Monitor, Lane Departure Warning, and Rear-View Camera work together to help you navigate the road with confidence, while the comprehensive airbag system and electronic stability control provide added protection.  Whether you're commuting to the office, embarking on a road trip, or simply enjoying the daily drive, the 2025 Hyundai Sonata SEL is the perfect companion. Experience the perfect blend of style, technology, and performance that this exceptional sedan has to offer. description: This Mazda Certified 2025 Mazda CX-30 2.5 S Select Sport, has a Jet Black Mica exterior and an Black interior color. 2,813 miles.  Stock Number SM763586. You can connect with us by calling (863) 274-7240.  No Accidents!  One Owner!     Automatic Full-Time All-Wheel, Perimeter/Approach Lights, 2 LCD Monitors In The Front, Cruise Control w/Steering Wheel Controls, Mazda Radar Cruise Control (MRCC) with Stop & Go, Voice Activated Dual Zone Front Automatic Air Conditioning, Blind Spot Monitoring (BSM) Blind Spot, Smart Brake Support (SBS), Rear Cross Traffic Alert (RCTA), Collision Mitigation-Front, Driver Monitoring-Alert, Back-Up Camera  Important Package and Feature Information    Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.  BLACK, LEATHERETTE SEAT TRIM   We price our cars, not our Customers. description: You're in Luck! This Classic Silver Metallic 2025 Toyota Corolla SE with Black/Red interior can be yours today!  No Accidents!  One Owner!   Features Include:   Convenience The cruise control accesses camera, radar and/or GPS satellite data, to automatically determine if it should slow for a curve in the road ahead. If the vehicle detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness it will automatically bring the vehicle to a stop and turn on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will be contacted. This intelligent cruise control system uses laser or radar to maintain a preset following distance behind another vehicle, automatically braking (to a complete stop if needed) or accelerating as required.Safety and Security With this system the driver's hands must remain on the wheel at all times but can be removed briefly (for a few seconds), otherwise the vehicle will prompt the driver to put their hands back on the wheel. The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision. The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display. An active lane departure system alerts the driver of unintended movement of the vehicle out of a designated traffic lane and automatically maintains the vehicle's position within that lane.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile devices can wirelessly connect to the internet through the vehicle's private mobile network. description: This  Sterling Gray Metallic 2025 Chevrolet Trailblazer LT with 18,401 miles has the style and comfort to fit your lifestyle!     No Accidents!   One Owner!        This vehicle is equipped with:  Driver Confidence Package ($395 value)Rear Park AssistRear Cross Traffic AlertLane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone AlertPreferred Equipment Group 1LT  Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. description: Why BUY from Lambert Buick GMC?     When you choose this Ebony Twilight Metallic 2025 Buick Envision Sport Touring with 21,624 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!           What this vehicle includes:     Preferred Equipment Group 1SL          Convenience GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. description: NO HIDDEN FEES! ALL RECONDITIONING COSTS ARE FULLY INCLUDED IN OUR PRICES.  This 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD LTZ is a true workhorse, built to handle the toughest jobs with uncompromising power and capability. Equipped with the renowned Duramax 6.6L V8 Turbodiesel engine, this truck delivers an impressive 470 horsepower and a staggering 975 lb-ft of torque, making it a force to be reckoned with on the job site or the open road.  - NAVIGATION - 6.6L V8 Diesel Turbocharged (Duramax) (B20-Diesel Compatible) - LTZ Convenience Package - LTZ Convenience Package II - Safety Package - Suspension Package - Up-Level Rear Seat with Storage Package  This Silverado is loaded with premium features that will elevate your driving experience, including the Bose Premium 7-Speaker Sound System, SiriusXM with 360L Trial Subscription, and a wealth of advanced safety and convenience technologies. The heated and ventilated front seats, power sliding rear window, and wireless charging capabilities ensure your comfort and convenience, while the HD Surround Vision and Trailer Camera Provisions provide unparalleled visibility and confidence when towing.  The exterior of this Silverado 2500HD LTZ is as impressive as its performance, with a bold and imposing presence thanks to the chrome accents, LED fog lamps, and 18-inch machined aluminum wheels with silver painted accents. The Durabed pickup bed offers unmatched utility, with the EZ Lift Power Lock and Release Tailgate and in-Vehicle Trailering App System making it a breeze to load, unload, and tow your gear.  Safety is a top priority, and this Silverado 2500HD LTZ is equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features, including Adaptive Cruise Control, Front and Rear Park Assist, Rear Cross Traffic Alert, and the Safety Alert Seat, which provides haptic feedback to warn the driver of potential hazards.  Whether you're tackling tough jobs or embarking on adventurous road trips, this 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD LTZ is the ultimate companion. Experience the power, capability, and premium features that make this truck a true leader in its class. description: Elevate your driving experience with the 2025 Ford Escape ST-Line. This exceptional SUV combines style, performance, and uncompromising capability, making it the perfect companion for your adventures.  Boasting a sleek black exterior, this one-owner Escape ST-Line is outfitted with an impressive array of features that will captivate you. Some of the highlights include:  - Bluetooth connectivity - LIKE NEW condition  The 1.5L EcoBoost engine, paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission and all-wheel drive, delivers a thrilling and efficient ride, with an impressive 26 city/32 highway MPG. The Escape ST-Line's dynamic handling and responsive steering will have you eagerly anticipating every turn.  Stepping inside, you'll be greeted by a well-appointed cabin that prioritizes both comfort and technology. Dual-zone automatic climate control, a power driver's seat, and steering wheel-mounted audio controls ensure a personalized driving experience. The SYNC 4 infotainment system, complete with SiriusXM radio and FordPass Connect, keeps you seamlessly connected on the go.  Safety is also a top priority in the Escape ST-Line, with features like dual front impact airbags, side-impact airbags, and an emergency communication system. The electronic stability control and traction control systems provide added peace of mind, while the automatic high-beam headlights and speed-sensitive wipers enhance visibility and convenience.  Alloy wheels, a rear spoiler, and body-colored bumpers lend a sporty and refined appearance to this Escape, making it a true head-turner on the road. The split-folding rear seat and generous cargo space ensure ample room for all your belongings, whether you're embarking on a weekend getaway or tackling daily errands.  This 2025 Ford Escape ST-Line is a remarkable SUV that combines style, performance, and cutting-edge technology. Experience the difference for yourself by scheduling a test drive at our showroom. These vehicles represent the highest standards of quality, transparency, and long-term value. Chevy Chase Acura has proudly served the Bethesda and greater Washington, DC community since 1939 and has been Maryland's #1 Acura dealership for new and certified vehicles since 2018, a distinction supported by over 4,000 Google reviews from loyal customers. Acura Certified Pre-Owned vehicles are carefully selected and fully up to date on all factory-recommended maintenance to help reduce long-term ownership costs. In addition to Acura's original 4-year/50,000-mile warranty, Certified Acura vehicles include an additional two years and 50,000 miles of coverage, providing a total of up to 6 years or 100,000 miles of warranty coverage from the original in-service date. To meet Acura's strict certification standards, each vehicle undergoes a comprehensive 182-point inspection and a meticulous reconditioning process performed by factory-trained Acura technicians using only genuine Acura parts, ensuring performance, reliability, and peace of mind. Chevy Chase Originals take transparency one step further. These vehicles were originally sold by us, serviced here, and maintained according to Acura factory standards, allowing us to provide a complete and verifiable service history under our One Dealer, One Story philosophy. At Chevy Chase Acura, pricing transparency is central to everything we do. Our market-based, one-price policy is driven by continuous real-time market research to ensure competitive, fair pricing without pressure or negotiation. This commitment to value, consistency, and customer care has made us Maryland's top Acura dealership since 2018 and a trusted automotive partner for generations of local families. Whether you choose to purchase entirely online or visit our showroom to experience the vehicle in person, our team is here to deliver a refined, straightforward, and confidence-driven buying experience.  No Accidents!  One Owner!    Important Package and Feature Information      Convenience GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control with lane change - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control with lane change, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up, and helps you make lane changes. Meet your ultimate co-pilot, hands-on cruise control with lane change.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring     At Chevy Chase Acura, we're here to Serve you! The spacious interior, with its split-folding rear seats, provides ample room for passengers and cargo, making it the perfect companion for your adventures.  Designed with your safety in mind, the 2025 Hyundai Santa Fe SE comes equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety technologies, including forward collision warning, automatic emergency braking, and a rearview camera. description: **Crystal White Pearl 2025 Subaru Outback Premium AWD Lineartronic CVT  2.5L 4-Cylinder  Only 8,990 Miles**  Adventure-ready, efficient, and packed with modern technology, this **2025 Subaru Outback Premium** in stunning **Crystal White Pearl** offers the perfect blend of comfort, capability, and everyday practicality. With only **8,990 miles**, this Outback is practically brand new and ready to deliver years of reliable performance backed by Subarus legendary reputation for safety and durability.  The exterior design of the 2025 Outback continues Subarus tradition of rugged sophistication. Finished in elegant Crystal White Pearl, this Outback stands out with its clean lines, bold grille, and athletic stance. Black lower body cladding and raised roof rails highlight its adventurous spirit while also protecting the vehicle from road debris and trail wear. Stylish alloy wheels and modern LED lighting complete the look, giving this Outback a confident presence whether parked downtown or heading toward the mountains. Integrated roof rails with crossbar capability make it easy to bring bikes, cargo carriers, skis, or kayaks along for the journey.  Under the hood, this Outback Premium is powered by a dependable **2.5L DOHC 4-cylinder Boxer engine**, paired with Subarus smooth and efficient **Lineartronic CVT**. This combination delivers excellent fuel efficiency without sacrificing performance, making it ideal for daily commuting, road trips, and everything in between. Subarus renowned **Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive** system comes standard, providing exceptional traction and stability in rain, snow, and rough road conditions. Whether navigating city streets, highways, or unpredictable weather, this Outback offers confidence and control in every season.  Step inside and youll find a spacious, refined cabin designed for comfort and convenience. The Premium trim offers high-quality materials and thoughtful features throughout, including supportive heated front seats, power-adjustable drivers seat, and dual-zone automatic climate control to keep everyone comfortable year-round. The large touchscreen infotainment system provides seamless access to Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, Bluetooth connectivity, and available navigation, keeping you connected and entertained on every drive. A quiet cabin and smooth ride make long trips enjoyable, while generous rear-seat space ensures passengers have room to stretch out and relax.  Versatility is a key strength of the Outback, and this one delivers with a large cargo area and easy-fold rear seats that create ample space for gear, groceries, luggage, or outdoor equipment. Whether youre loading up for a weekend getaway or tackling daily errands, this Outback adapts to your lifestyle with ease.  Safety is at the core of Subarus design, and this 2025 Outback Premium comes equipped with the latest **EyeSight Driver Assist Technology**, including adaptive cruise control, lane centering, pre-collision braking, and lane departure warning. Additional features such as a rearview camera, blind spot detection, and rear cross-traffic alert help provide added peace of mind on every drive.  With ultra-low miles, modern styling, advanced safety, and Subarus proven AWD capability, this **2025 Subaru Outback Premium** offers exceptional value and versatility. Its the ideal choice for drivers seeking a nearly new SUV that delivers comfort, efficiency, and confidence wherever the road leads. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane.
